nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 黑腹裂籽雀
nodes.summary: 黑腹裂籽雀（Black-bellied seedcracker，学名 Pyrenestes ostrinus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括热带雨林、沼泽，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They live in most Central African countries and inhabit tropical rainforest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Black-bellied seedcrackers inhabit tropical rainforest of Africa and nest in moist environments, near swamps, marsh, ponds, wet prairies and in moist broadleaf forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: M.|last6=Collingham|first6=Yvonne C.|last7=Rahbek|first7=Carsten|last8=Huntley|first8=Brian|date=2009|title=Projected impacts of climate change on a continent-wide protected area network|journal=Ecology Letters |volume=12|issue=5|pages=420–431|doi=10.1111/j.1461-0248.2009.01297.x|pmid=19379136|issn=1461-023X}} Nowadays, the main threats faced by black-bellied seedcrackers emanate from nest predation by rats, snakes and feral cats, habitat over harvest and window collisions (increasing with urbanization)
